meta.title: IPIP Big Five Markers (50)
meta.subtitle: Assess the five broad personality traits.
meta.description: A 50-item public-domain Big Five inventory. Results are descriptive and non-diagnostic.
meta.disclaimer: This assessment is for self-reflection only and is not a clinical diagnosis.

consent.title: Consent and Disclaimer
consent.body: I understand this is a self-reflection tool, not a clinical test, and I consent to store results locally on this device.

interpretation.low: Lower range for this trait in your current responses.
interpretation.medium: Mid-range expression of this trait in your current responses.
interpretation.high: Higher range for this trait in your current responses.

items.bfm50_001: I am the life of the party.
items.bfm50_004: I talk to many different people at gatherings.
items.bfm50_005: I do not mind being the center of attention.
items.bfm50_007: I have little to say in groups.
items.bfm50_009: I avoid drawing attention to myself.
items.bfm50_010: I prefer to listen rather than speak.
items.bfm50_012: I take time out for others.
items.bfm50_014: I make people feel at ease.
items.bfm50_016: I am not interested in other peoples problems.
items.bfm50_017: I insult people when I get irritated.
items.bfm50_018: I am not really interested in others.
items.bfm50_019: I can be cold and distant.
items.bfm50_020: I hold grudges for a long time.
items.bfm50_023: I get chores done right away.
items.bfm50_027: I make a mess of things.
items.bfm50_028: I often forget to put things back in their place.
items.bfm50_030: I postpone tasks until the last minute.
items.bfm50_034: I change my mood a lot.
items.bfm50_036: I am relaxed most of the time.
items.bfm50_040: I handle setbacks without much anxiety.
items.bfm50_044: I am quick to understand things.
items.bfm50_046: I am not interested in abstract ideas.
items.bfm50_047: I do not have a good imagination.
items.bfm50_048: I have difficulty understanding abstract ideas.
items.bfm50_050: I prefer familiar routines to new ideas.
